sources.name: NASA Technical Reports Server — MA-7 Mission Report
sources.description: Complete post-flight report for Mercury-Atlas 7, including trajectory data, systems performance, crew observations, and the detailed fuel consumption timeline that documented Carpenter's attitude control fuel depletion.

sources.name: NSSDC Master Catalog — Mercury-Atlas 7
sources.description: NASA Space Science Data Coordinated Archive entry for Aurora 7 spacecraft, including orbital parameters, mission timeline, and instrument manifest.

sources.name: UniProt — GFP (Aequorea victoria)
sources.description: Complete protein sequence, structure references, functional annotations, and post-translational modification data for green fluorescent protein from Aequorea victoria.

sources.name: RCSB Protein Data Bank — GFP Crystal Structure (1EMA)
sources.description: X-ray crystal structure of enhanced GFP at 1.9 Å resolution, showing the β-barrel architecture, chromophore positioning, and the water molecules that participate in the hydrogen bonding network around the chromophore.

sources.name: FPbase — Fluorescent Protein Database
sources.description: Comprehensive fluorescent protein reference: spectra, quantum yield, extinction coefficient, maturation time, and comparison data for wild-type avGFP and all engineered variants.

sources.name: NOAA Fisheries — Rhinoceros Auklet Data
sources.description: Population surveys, colony data, and foraging ecology for Cerorhinca monocerata, including Protection Island colony census data and prey composition studies.

sources.name: USGS Protection Island NWR — Seabird Monitoring
sources.description: Long-term seabird monitoring data from Protection Island National Wildlife Refuge, including Rhinoceros Auklet nesting success, chick growth rates, and prey delivery rates.

sources.name: SEALAB Program Records — Naval History and Heritage Command
sources.description: Official records of the Navy's SEALAB I, II, and III programs, including Carpenter's participation in SEALAB II (1965), habitat specifications, and dive logs.

sources.name: Shimomura Laboratory Publications
sources.description: Osamu Shimomura's publications on aequorin and GFP isolation and characterization, beginning with the seminal 1962 paper on aequorin extraction from Aequorea victoria at Friday Harbor.

sources.name: Friday Harbor Laboratories — UW Marine Biology Station
sources.description: University of Washington's marine biology research station on San Juan Island, where Shimomura collected Aequorea victoria specimens and where ongoing cnidarian research continues.
